reasoning_top2.description: Exactly two short sentences (<=25 words each) giving the two most important reasons behind your bucket choice. Write these BEFORE picking the bucket.

bucket.description: Verbal bucket for P(this is a real effect that would survive a well-powered replication).

confidence_in_bucket.description: How confident you are that this is the right bucket. `low` means the bucket could plausibly be one step lower or higher; `high` means you would not move.
